generated_oml:
instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model insights used to adjust robot control algorithms for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization for operator insights on robot motion and friction data"
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot axis parameters for operational insights"
]

instance ModelRefinementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights for model refinement during operation based on real-time data"
]

instance DataIntegrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Integrating data from Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
]

instance ControlAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust robot control algorithms based on friction model insights to improve motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot motion and friction data for operator insights"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of robot axis parameters during operation"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeMonitoringInsight
]

instance ModelRefinementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Model refinement during operation based on real-time data"
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelRefinementInsight
]

instance RobotControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Adjusting robot control algorithms based on friction model insights for improved motion accuracy"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlAdjustmentAction
]

instance DataIntegrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrating data from Asset Administration Shell for digital twin asset management"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataIntegrationInsight
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for managing digital twin assets and data linkage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataIntegrationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction and motor dynamics simulation"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, ModelRefinementService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance SINUMERIKControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables RobotControlService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tools for visualizing robot motion and friction data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance GearboxPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxPositionEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted on the motor shaft of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder mounted behind the gearbox of the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current to the permanent magnet synchronous motor of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor with current input for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component of the cycloidal gearbox in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for rotational energy transformation in the first axis of MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
]

instance MeasuredMotorPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position of the motor shaft from encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredGearboxPosition : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured angular position behind the gearbox from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredCurrent : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured current input to the permanent magnet synchronous motor"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DerivedAngularVelocity : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated angular velocity from motor position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DerivedTorque : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calculated torque value from motor dynamics model using current and position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted, MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

]

instance SysML_IBD : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo AssetAdministrationShellEnabler
]

    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Stribeck friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink Dahl friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink LuGre friction model for joint friction identification"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance MABIMAX100FirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox, SINUMERIKController, MotorPositionEncoder, GearboxPositionEncoder, CurrentSensor, SysML_BDD, SysML_IBD, CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, DahlFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel, AssetAdministrationShellEnabler, SimulinkSimulationEnabler, MQTTDataStreamingEnabler, SINUMERIKControllerEnabler, DashboardVisualizationEnabler, FrictionIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService, RealTimeMonitoringService, ModelRefinementService, RobotControlService, DataIntegrationService, FrictionModelInsight, VisualizationInsight, RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ModelRefinementInsight, ControlAdjustmentAction, DataIntegrationInsight
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements during robot operation; no specific time intervals specified beyond real-time synchronization"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
